content: Black's move occupied the last liberty that was left to five white stones, in two strings. Those five stones were thus captured and removed.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by carlosalberto (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:La mossa del nero occupava l'ultima libertà che era rimasta a cinque pietre bianche, su due catene. Quelle cinque pietre
